calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Continued To Jun-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 25, 2015 in Department 525:
No appearance by Stephen J. Weller, Plaintiff/Appellant.
Carole Craig, Defendant/Respondent appears in Propria Persona with witnesses Charlotte Peterson, Bonnie Hellevig - house manager, and Forest McDonald.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Carole Craig and witnesses are sworn.

Defendant/Respondent, Carole Craig testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: not marked - pictures, letter of list of charges, rental agreement, and various exhibits.

Witness Bonnie Hellevig testifies on behalf of Carole Craig.
Witnesses Ms. Peterson and Mr. McDonald testify on behalf of Carole Craig.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to Defendant/Respondent Ms. Craig by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Micelle Brant; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Continued To Apr-17-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Continued To Apr-17-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
